mechanics.excerpt: Surgery Once the patient is prepped and stabilized, character with the Surgery Skill can step in and perform emergency treatment stave off death: The surgery takes hour plus the total wound value of all wounds suffered by the patient times min utes character with MedTech must be present throughout the operation t0 act as surgical assistant: The difficulty modifier for the Surgery Skill Check is equal to the total wound value of all wounds suffered by the target minus the character'$ BOD WIL (in other words_ the same modifier the MedTech Check had): Proper equipment important in this situation: the treat: ing character has a advanced medical kit but is not in fully equipped hospital; the target number has Modifier Treatment impossible witnout least advanced medica Other modifiers may apply to the TN as usual for Action Checks (see Modifiers_ 16).
